rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or clauses without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to component ports
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to component ports
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for assumptions and guarantees
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equation declarations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constant declarations
Use `assign output = expression;` for assignments in implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not add architecture to fix validator diagnostics; repair the contract instead
Do not use AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean; use int, real, and bool instead
